name: Reiner
bio: Towering and wordless, Reiner was the executioner to Garrux's judgment. Once a war-priest turned warrior, Reiner bound his soul to the Runes of Obedience, forfeiting his voice and freedom to serve Garrux's will. His weapon, a runed spear as tall as himself, could pierce both armor and enchantment alike. Where Tiapold tested minds, Reiner tested endurance. His silence was intimidating, but his loyalty was pure. Many challengers learned too late that while Garrux judged with words, Reiner judged with death.
One of Garrux's two champions; kills King Felix in battle, but is consumed along with Garrux and Tiapold by Aegen's final desperate spell.
